mapper.insert: insert into production_plan (plan_no, plan_name, bom_id, plan_num, completed_num, start_time, end_time, priority, status, creator_id, publisher_id, create_time, update_time, remark) value (#{planNo}, #{planName}, #{bomId}, #{planNum}, 0, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{priority}, 'CREATED', #{creatorId}, #{publisherId}, now(), now(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update production_plan
plan_no = #{plan.planNo},
plan_name = #{plan.planName},
bom_id = #{plan.bomId},
plan_num = #{plan.planNum},
start_time = #{plan.startTime},
end_time = #{plan.endTime},
priority = #{plan.priority},
remark = #{plan.remark},
update_time = now()
where plan_no = #{planNo}
